backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the game backend, defining character, item, and marketplace data types and storage, with CRUD operations for characters, items, user profiles, and marketplace listings, plus authorization via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their IDs, titles, affected files, components, and test IDs, covering monster roster expansion, XP formula updates, and dungeon screen procedural generation integration.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each file's role and recent changes, serving as a quick reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design token system (colors, radii, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Abyss Ascendant', mounting the app at `#root` and loading the Vite entry module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages global app state (authentication, character selection, dungeon flow, pending monsters/loot, level-up modal) and wires together all screens and hooks.
frontend/src/components/AbilitySelectMod: Modal component for selecting and toggling character abilities up to the available ability-point limit, grouped by archetype with color-coded labels and a confirm/close interface.
frontend/src/components/CharacterCreatio: React component for creating a new character, allowing the user to set a name, realm, and allocate stat points, then generating starter equipment and persisting the character via backend mutations.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSelectS: Displays a list of existing characters with health bars and delete options, handles loading/error states, and provides navigation to select or create a character.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSheet.t: Renders a detailed character sheet showing stats, XP progress, abilities, and realm/status, with modals for spending unspent stat points and selecting abilities.
frontend/src/components/DungeonRunScreen: Runs a dungeon combat simulation on mount, animates the combat log line-by-line, then saves results to the backend and calls completion or death callbacks.
frontend/src/components/DungeonSelectScr: UI for selecting dungeon mode and monster level before starting a run, showing XP/drop rate info and generating monsters, with a modal for claiming pending loot.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Reusable health bar component that renders a colored progress bar with HP values in either compact or full display modes.
Renders a tabbed inventory UI (Inventory, Stash, Equipped) allowing the player to select items and perform actions like equip, unequip, move to/from stash using ItemCard components.
frontend/src/components/ItemTooltip.tsx: Displays a styled tooltip card for a GeneratedItem showing its rarity, type, base stats, and affixes with icons and color-coded labels.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardScree: Shows a mock leaderboard UI with Softcore and Hardcore realm tabs, displaying ranked adventurers with level, class tier, XP, and status using placeholder data.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpModal.tsx: A modal dialog that lets the player allocate unspent stat points (STR, DEX, INT, VIT) upon leveling up, confirming the new base stats back to the parent.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Renders the game's login/landing screen with Internet Identity authentication, displaying the game logo, feature highlights, and a login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/MarketplaceScree: React component for a player marketplace with browse and sell tabs, allowing users to list inventory items for sale at a set price and buy items listed by other players.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky header navigation component that renders nav tabs for all major game screens, displays character info with a health bar, and provides back-to-character-select and logout buttons.
frontend/src/components/ProfessionsPlace: Static placeholder screen for the Professions feature, displaying a 'Coming Soon' message with icons and descriptions for four planned crafting disciplines.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that forces new users to choose a validated adventurer username before proceeding, submitting it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ShrinesPlacehold: Static placeholder screen for the Shrines of Power feature, showing a 'Coming Soon' message with animated icons and descriptions for four planned shrine types.
frontend/src/components/XPBar.tsx: Displays a character's XP progress toward the next level as a styled progress bar, supporting both compact and full display modes.
frontend/src/data/abilities.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a static array of combat abilities (e.g., Power Strike, Fireball, Backstab), each with damage multipliers, scaling stats, cooldowns, and display metadata.
frontend/src/data/monsters.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and data pools for monster generation, including base monster templates, prefix/suffix pools with stat modifiers, and a GeneratedMonster interface used to compose named monsters with combined stats.
frontend/src/engine/combatEngine.ts: Implements the turn-based combat simulation engine, handling player and monster attack intervals, damage/defense calculations from stats and equipment, XP rewards, loot drops, and multi-monster dungeon encounters.
frontend/src/engine/lootGenerator.ts: Generates randomized loot items with rarity-weighted rolls, level-scaled affix values, and item-type-specific stat pools for Weapons, Armor, and Trinkets.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHealthRegen.ts: React hook that regenerates player HP at 2 HP/second while out of combat, syncing to the backend periodically and when full health is reached.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, delegation validity checks, and exposing identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalCharacter.ts: Custom React hook that manages a local character state by merging backend character data with localStorage-persisted data (abilities, equipment, inventory). Handles HP calculation, starter equipment generation, and stat point tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks and mutations for all backend interactions including character CRUD, HP syncing, dungeon result submission, stat spending, and marketplace operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, imports Google Fonts (Cinzel, Inter), and defines CSS custom properties for the dark fantasy theme including colors for surfaces, rarities, and health bars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: Defines core game TypeScript types (LocalCharacter, BaseStats, CharacterStats, CombatResult) and shared utility functions for XP, level, HP, ability points, and stat point calculations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with CSS variable-based colors (surfaces, rarities, health), custom fonts, border radii, and animations like accordion and pulse-glow.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the current version, architectural notes, existing features (procedural monster generation, XP scaling, dungeon screen updates), and known issues for the RPG game.
